issues: 1x silhouette too small to read as distinct item
limited personality — competent but forgettable pixel boots
darker sole areas merge with dark bg, reducing silhouette edge clarity
reasoning: At 4x the boots read clearly as a pair of adventure boots — warm orange-brown body, blue cuff accent, blocky pixel art toe shape that is friendly and toy-like. Light bg contrast is strong; dark bg is adequate but the boot sole's darker pixels bleed into the bg slightly. Charm is present (rounded pixel shapes, colour pop from the blue trim) but not memorable — no distinctive hook that makes these boots feel personality-driven vs generic. The sticker test at 1x fails: the sprite shrinks to an ambiguous warm smudge with no readable silhouette. Score 6: clears basic charm bar at 4x but falls short on 1x readability and distinctiveness needed for a confident pass.
